codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/connection-tokens'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer 6782dfcaa7e7f88621b4e6116d2de78e81b7ca8287b17ed01649684ec277aed3'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

  💭 Connect and send
  🍺 🆕📞 host port❗ ➡️ socket
  🍺 💬 socket 📇 request❗❗
  
  💭 Read and print response
  🍺 👂 socket 4096❗ ➡️ data
  😀 🍺 🔡 data❗❗
  
  💭 Close socket
  🚪 socket❗

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/pair'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "code": "DMJWKC",
      "worldId": "test-world-integration",
      "worldTitle": "Test World"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
